g.text: Interactive workshop for data, LLMs, CV, RAG, and fine-tuning
: Python 3.12.2 (Use Python 3.10 or newer for the TUI and test suite.)
: Found 4 notebook(s) (Notebooks power the lab launcher and hands-on sections.)
: Available: jupyter, ffmpeg (Jupyter launches notebooks, ffmpeg helps with video workflows.)
: Branch: feat/textual-tui-polish; dirty files: 18 (A clean branch makes screenshot generation and reviews easier.)
